defs: The act of amplifying or enlarging in dimensions; enlargement; extension.

The enlarging of a simple statement by particularity of description, the use of epithets, etc., for rhetorical effect; diffuse narrative or description, or a dilating upon all the particulars of a subject.
quotes: Exaggeration is a species of amplification.
I shall summarily, without any amplification at all, show in what manner defects have been supplied.

defs: The matter by which a statement is amplified; as, the subject was presented without amplifications.
